hero.hero_overview:
Karina is a magic Assassin who specializes in burst damage and finishing low-HP enemies. She is strongest in the jungle and excels at picking off squishy targets.
Her ultimate can reset after securing a kill, allowing her to chain eliminations in team fights. However, she struggles against crowd control and tanky heroes.
hero.hero_strength:
🔥 Main Strengths
1. High Burst Damage
Karina can instantly eliminate squishy heroes like Marksman and Mage with her full combo.
2. Ultimate Reset Mechanic
If she kills a marked enemy, her Ultimate resets — allowing her to chain kills in team fights.
3. Strong 1v1 Duelist
She wins most one-on-one fights, especially against heroes that rely on basic attacks.
4. Basic Attack Immunity (Skill 1)
She becomes immune to basic attacks for a short time, making her very strong against Marksmen.
5. Snowball Potential
If she gets early kills, she can dominate the game and control objectives easily.
6. Fast Jungle Clear
Her AoE damage allows her to clear jungle camps quickly and rotate fast.
hero.hero_weakness:
Weak against crowd control (stun, suppress, knock-up)
Struggles against tanky heroes
Needs snowball to stay strong
Vulnerable after using all skills
Low pressure before Level 4
Wrong target = easy death

spell.spell_desc:
🔥 Retribution
Best spell for Jungle Karina
Deals damage to jungle monsters and enemy heroes.
Helps her farm faster in early game.
Can be upgraded (Ice/Flame/Bloody Retribution) for extra effects.
Makes securing Turtle and Lord easier.

The Sky Piercer item is best to use in early to mid game when you have advantages against the opponents—so, you usually buy Sky Piercer after buying Starlium Scythe.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Karina and Khufra are highly compatible because Khufra can dive in and control multiple enemies, creating opportunities for Karina to burst them all instantly.
Roam Chou and Karina have great synergy, as they can pick off a single enemy even under the tower.
Karina can dive under the tower while Mathilda provides a dash to help Karina safely retreat.
Sustain Karina & WTF Heal by Floryn
Karina and Tigreal are highly compatible because Khufra can dive in and control multiple enemies, creating opportunities for Karina to burst them all instantly. (Same as Khufra
Angela can give Karina more mobility for diving and retreating, along with unlimited healing similar to Floryn.
Chip can provide a portal for Karina if she is too far away when a clash is happening. Instant Savage
Useless
Useless
Diggie can help Karina in a clash if she gets stuck in crowd control.
Jawhead can help Karina clear jungle camps faster in the early game and can pick off enemies like Chou, but his crowd control is limited.
Lolita can provide a shield to Karina while diving and can also crowd control enemies.
Rafaela provides healing like Angela and Floryn, but with limited crowd control. The advantage is that she can revive Karina if she dies while diving.
Faramis can help Karina survive in long-lasting clashes.

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on farming until you get your ultimate. If your enemies can counter you, playing safe is key. If you can counter them, don't be afraid to play aggressively.

If your enemies can counter you, playing safe is still key. Focus on farming until late game and split-push if you can. Don't dive if it's risky. If you can counter your enemies, play aggressively: dive when necessary, take their jungle camps, and try to end the game as soon as possible.

Karina is dangerous in the late game but can be risky to play. It does not matter if enemies can counter you, as it is a win or lose situation. The best approach is to wait for the perfect moment and trust your instincts.

equips.equip_desc:
Tough Boots. Counters crowd control and slows.

Starlium Scythe. Provides mana, true damage, spell vamp, and cooldown reduction.

Feather of Heaven. Maximizes passive damage, helps with pushing and farming, provides cooldown reduction, life steal, and extra magic damage up to 5 times.

Concentrated Energy. Increases magic power, life steal, and high spell vamp up to 6 times.

Queen's Wings. Grants high spell vamp and 30% cooldown reduction when activated.

Holy Crystal. Greatly increases magic power.

Alternative / situational items:

Sky Piercer. Strong for early game.

Immortality & Winter Crown. Useful for late-game survivability and switching.

hero.hero_overview: Karina is the best killer among the Dark Elves who lived codependently with her younger sister Selena. But as the older sister, Karina failed to prevent Selena from dedicating herself to the Abyss. In order to stop her sister's evil deeds, and to find a way to bring her back, Karina embarked on a new journey.
hero.hero_strength: Karina is a strong assassin who excels at bursting squishy heroes and countering basic attack-reliant foes, especially when ahead in level, thanks to her true damage and skill scaling.
hero.hero_weakness: Multiple Crowd Control & Burst Heroes

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Karina works best with heroes who can provide crowd control (CC) or initiation, allowing her to safely dive in and finish off enemies. Heroes like Tigreal, Atlas, Johnson, or Khufra can lock enemies in place, giving Karina the perfect opportunity to burst them down. She also synergizes well with Angela, as Angela ultimate provides her extra shield and sustain, letting Karina stay longer in fights while executing targets.

Recommended Synergies: Tigreal, Atlas, Johnson, Angela

counters.counter_desc:
Karina struggles against heroes with strong crowd control and burst damage since she is squishy and relies heavily on mobility. Heroes like Saber (lockdown + instant burst), Eudora (point-and-click stun + high magic damage), and Chou (single-target suppression) can stop her before she can finish her combo. Additionally, tanky heroes with high durability and sustain such as Uranus and Esmeralda are difficult for Karina to burst down, making her less effective in extended fights.

Dangerous Counters: Saber, Eudora, Alice, Ruby, Arlott

dominants.dominant_desc: Your first objective when using Karina is to build at least 2 core items (Starlinium Scythe and Holy Crystal). Once you get these, you can be sure that you will be able to burst or instantly delete mages and marksman

emblems.emblem_desc: We should prioritize Karina jungle capabilities using Seasoned Hunter, and we need to use Killing Spree for a smoother transition when going in and out during clashes

equips.equip_desc: This build for Karina is designed to maximize her burst magic damage while also giving her sustain for extended fights. Ice Hunters Swift Boots provides faster jungle clearing and mobility, while Starlinium Scythe adds cooldown reduction and spell vamp for better sustain. Holy Crystal greatly boosts her magic power, making her combos deadlier, and Concentrated Energy gives lifesteal to recover health during clashes. Genius Wand reduces enemy magic defense, allowing her to shred even tanky opponents, and Blood Wings offers massive magic power and durability for the late game. With this setup, Karina can swiftly eliminate priority targets and safely transition in and out of team fights.

hero.hero_overview: Karina is an assassin mage hero in Mobile Legends known for her high burst damage and ability to quickly eliminate squishy targets. She excels at roaming and picking off enemies during team fights. With her skills, she can reset cooldowns upon securing kills or assists, allowing her to chain abilities and dominate fights.
hero.hero_strength: High burst damage capable of instantly killing fragile enemies.
hero.hero_weakness: Very squishy and vulnerable to crowd control.

data.recommend: This guide is recommended for players who want to maximize Karina jungle potential. It provides the best item build and battle spell choice

dominants.dominant_desc:
Karina is pretty weak early on Karina is pretty weak early on, so it's better to focus on clearing your jungle rather than going for the Lithowanderer. Start with either the purple buff or red buff, depending on the situation. Going for Litho right away usually isn't worth it since you'll end up near the side lane with less value compared to a proper jungle route. If the enemy roamer invades your jungle, be cautious or ask your team for help. Try to visit the gold lane often too, since most marksmen scale hard into the late game 

Mid game
Make sure you have some core items like Sky Piercer before going for solo kills. At this stage, Karina can start looking for weak targets, especially those caught out of position.
dominants.dominant_title: NEVER initiate without your 3rd skill (Ultimate) but if situations are dire, you may

emblems.emblem_desc: This one is for those jungle obsessed people, incredibly this helps in timing your retribution with your passive to deal extra damage to the turtle in the early game.
For those people who like gaining their items earlier for micro team compositions
For people who heavily rotate from lane to lane to help out allies additionally giving speed boosts whenever in jungle to better reach jungle monsters

equips.equip_desc: Your normal burst build, feather of heaven is there to activate concentrated energy passive for an extra 6% damage increase as well as more spell vamp
This one works just as well as the other one with Queen's Wings added to cope up with her squishy-ness, this helps her to stay in fights more.

hero.hero_overview: Karina is like the assassin version of Martis—she's fast, hits hard, and is great at taking down enemies quickly. Her skills let her move quickly and break through defenses, making her deadly in fights. Her passive ability helps her deal extra "true damage," which means it ignores armor, so even tanky enemies can go down fast. It also makes it easier for her to clear jungle monsters. Karina is best used as a "finisher"—she waits until her teammates weaken the enemies, then jumps in to finish them off.
hero.hero_strength:
Her First skill :
Karina gets a speed boost for a short time and powers up her next basic attack. While it's active, she can deflect regular basic attacks so she wont take damage from normal hits, with revamped Kimmy's basic attacks now being included. This is great for chasing low-health enemies or diving into fights without instantly getting shredded by marksmen. Second Skill Just a simple area attack. She swings her weapon and hits nearby enemies, not much to it.

Flame retribution : When this hero uses FLAME RETRIBUTION on an enemy with magic power or damage capabilities expect to deal abnormal damage than expected ;)
hero.hero_weakness: Karina is an assassin hero known for being fast, dealing strong damage, and clearing the jungle. But once Karina gets caught by an enemy with a stun or other crowd control she dies easily. That's why she is best off with an initiator tank to gain the enemies attention while she hides in the bush waiting to finish off the enemy.

data.recommend: For anyone trying an easy assassin to master Shes your Lucky Pick! -K/DA

spell.spell_desc:
Karina is mostly played in the jungle, which is her main role. She focuses on clearing jungle monsters and helping take important objectives like the turtle or lord. Using Retribution is important because it helps when triggering her passive and deal extra true damage, making it easier to time and secure kills or objectives.

If you're up against squishy heroes, ICY Retribution is a good choice since it slows them down and makes them easier to catch. If the enemy team has tanky heroes, FLAME Retribution works better because it STEALS enemy magic and physical power and damage respectively and helps Karina cut through their defenses.
